result:
**Proposed goal: Add an Interactive Mandelbrot & Julia Set Fractal Explorer simulation mode (Shift+Z)**

The project has 22 simulations spanning cellular automata, physics, biology, procedural generation, and algorithms — but no **mathematics/fractals** category. A real-time fractal explorer would be the most visually striking mode yet: the user can pan and zoom into the Mandelbrot set with keyboard controls, toggle to the corresponding Julia set at the cursor position, and cycle through color palettes. It fills a clear gap, adds a new category, and the infinite-zoom nature makes it uniquely replayable compared to the other simulations.
